narrative:
Pickerington City C (precinct in Fairfield County) has 838 registered voters, with 61.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a clear Republican lean of 6.8 percentage points.
